Parameters

jobExecutionContext IJobExecutionContext

Properties

Calendar

Get a handle to the Quartz.ICalendar referenced by the Quartz.ITrigger instance that fired the Quartz.IJob.

[JsonPropertyName("Calender")]
public ICalendar Calendar { get; }

Property Value

ICalendar

FireInstanceId

Get the unique id that identifies this particular firing instance of the trigger.

[JsonPropertyName("FireInstanceId")]
public string FireInstanceId { get; }

Property Value

string

FireTimeUtc

The actual time the trigger fired.

[JsonPropertyName("FireTimeUtc")]
public DateTimeOffset FireTimeUtc { get; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset

JobDetail

Get the JobDetail associated with the Quartz.IJob.

[JsonPropertyName("JobDetail")]
public JobDetail JobDetail { get; }

Property Value

JobDetail

JobInstance

Get the instance of the Quartz.IJob that was created for this execution.

[JsonPropertyName("JobInstance")]
public string JobInstance { get; }

Property Value

string

JobRunTime

The amount of time the job ran for.

[JsonPropertyName("JobRunTime")]
public TimeSpan JobRunTime { get; }

Property Value

TimeSpan

MergedJobDataMap

Get the convenience Quartz.JobDataMap of this execution context.

[JsonPropertyName("MergedJobDataMap")]
public JobDataMap MergedJobDataMap { get; }

Property Value

JobDataMap

NextFireTimeUtc

Gets the next fire time.

[JsonPropertyName("NextFireTimeUtc")]
public DateTimeOffset? NextFireTimeUtc { get; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset?

PreviousFireTimeUtc

Gets the previous fire time.

[JsonPropertyName("PreviousFireTimeUtc")]
public DateTimeOffset? PreviousFireTimeUtc { get; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset?

Recovering

If the Quartz.IJob is being re-executed because of a 'recovery' situation, this method will return true.

[JsonPropertyName("Recovering")]
public bool Recovering { get; }

Property Value

bool

RecoveringTriggerKey

Returns the TriggerKeys of the originally scheduled and now recovering job.

[JsonPropertyName("RecoveringTriggerKey")]
public TriggerKey RecoveringTriggerKey { get; }

Property Value

TriggerKey

RefireCount

Gets the refire count.

[JsonPropertyName("RefireCount")]
public int RefireCount { get; }

Property Value

int

ScheduledFireTimeUtc

The scheduled time the trigger fired for.

[JsonPropertyName("ScheduledFireTimeUtc")]
public DateTimeOffset? ScheduledFireTimeUtc { get; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset?

Scheduler

Get a handle to the Quartz.IScheduler instance that fired the Quartz.IJob.

[JsonPropertyName("Scheduler")]
public IScheduler Scheduler { get; }

Property Value

IScheduler

Trigger

Get a handle to the Quartz.ITrigger instance that fired the Quartz.IJob.

[JsonPropertyName("Trigger")]
public Trigger Trigger { get; }

Property Value

Trigger
